docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZHOU, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT CHINA YOUTH TRAVEL SERVICE INTERNATIONAL, INC. WANG, JASON  (GULLIVER TRAVEL) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHINA YOUTH TRAVEL SERVICE INTERNATIONAL, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHOU, CHARLES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WANG, JASON  (GULLIVER TRAVEL) $2,287.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,339.00, JUDGEMENT ORDERED FOR DEFENDANT CHINA YOUTH TRAVEL SERVICE INTERNATIONAL, INC. AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF CHARLES ZHOY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHOU, CHARLES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHINA YOUTH TRAVEL SERVICE INTERNATIONAL, INC. PER DECL OF PLFT AND SHERIFF'S DEPT, SET A NEW COURT HEARING DATE.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT WANG, JASON  (GULLIVER TRAVEL)
